name: Patronus: A ByteDance DeerFlow Agentic System
postCreateCommand: git submodule update --init --recursive && cd deer-flow && pip install -e '.[dev]' && pip install mcp-server-fetch==2025.4.7 && make config && cd frontend && npm install -g pnpm && pnpm install && (echo $GITHUB_TOKEN | docker login ghcr.io -u $GITHUB_USER --password-stdin 2>/dev/null || true) && (docker pull enterprise-public-cn-beijing.cr.volces.com/vefaas-public/all-in-one-sandbox:latest 2>/dev/null || true)
postStartCommand: echo '✅ Codespace ready — edit deer-flow/.env with API keys, then: cd deer-flow && make dev (starts all services on localhost:2026). Enable aio sandbox in deer-flow/config.yaml for isolated Docker execution.'
